title: trisetaria elongata
intro: Trisetaria elongata, also known as slender hair grass or long-branched hair grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Trisetaria elongata include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
